result.name: STL Batch Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing: fixes the -0.99 threshold bug, checks inverted normals, open/non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, and produces a JSON report.

result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity, normal consistency (fixed threshold bug from provided validator), degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges, and computes surface area, volume, and bounding box.

manifest.name: STL Binary+ASCII Validator
manifest.description: Validates both binary and ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: auto-detects format, checks manifold integrity, inverted normals (fixed threshold bug), degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges, duplicate faces, and reports surface area and volume.
